title: Soulection Radio Show #512 (Blaq Pages Takeover)
content:
African DJ & producer Blaq Pages takes over the show.
<!--more-->


Follow on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/blaqpages) | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/blaq.pages/?hl=en) | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/blaq_pages) | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/c/DjPages)
